goal: Ship v7.3 Governed Multi-Actor Pilot as a bounded Council-and-actor handoff contract.
risk: AOF may claim multi-actor organization work when one parent AI silently role-plays actors or actor outputs bypass Council judgment.
loss_boundary: No governed multi-actor claim without core Council roles, actor roster evidence, actor output handoffs, Council judgment, and Work Execution Packet closure.
acceptance_gates: release-state-audit includes the v7.3 pilot gate
evidence_plan: schema, command, focused tests, Council review, Work Execution Packet, pilot audit
stop_conditions: stop if the audit cannot fail missing actor handoffs or missing Council roles
